response.justification: Bogdan has strong C/C++ experience and deep embedded/system-level knowledge from roles like National Instruments and Altom Consulting, but lacks direct exposure to networking security features (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.), embedded Linux kernel modifications, or LAN-switch operations. His primary focus has been web/mobile/embedded systems outside security domains, and Japanese language proficiency is unconfirmed.
strengths: Strong C/C++ and Linux system-level development experience
Proven ability to learn complex domains (e.g., robotic arms, real-time systems)
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical communities
concerns: No demonstrated experience with required security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.)
Limited exposure to networking switch operations or embedded firmware development
